title: Satin Mood Fragrance Oil - 10ml Suitable for Candles, Soaps, diffusers, Cosmetics, Wax Melts, Designer
features: Supplied in 10ml amber glass bottle with dropper and cap
MSDS & IFRA cert available on request
Fragrance oils are completely synthetic, and they should not be confused with Essential Oils.
Suitable In Soaps, Candles, Oil Burners, Wax Melts, Bath Salts, Bath Bombs, Slime, Cosmetic Products.
Our fragrance oils are produced to deliver an imitation scent reminiscent of a certain product, perfume, fruit, food, etc.
description: Product description The scent opens with an intoxicating blend of precious oud wood, which is seamlessly intertwined with the smooth sweetness of Bulgarian rose and violet. Hints of warm amber and vanilla add depth and sensuality, creating a beautiful harmony between dark and light. Directions For candle and wax melt use: Add 1-2% of fragrance oil to the wax. For soap use: Add 0.5-1% of fragrance oil to the soap batter. For diffuser use: Add 5-10 drops of fragrance oil to water. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not ingest. Safety Warning Potential skin irritation, keep out of reach of children, do not ingest, avoid contact with eyes and mouth, flammable See more
